summary: Tested NEW Reviews multi-page flow + Partner Logos backend & dashboard + public-page integration + Germany Fair 'Our Branches' footer. 19/19 backend pytest cases pass. Dashboard E2E (login -> reviews tab -> add review with 2 pages -> 2 reviews created) passes. Partner Logos tab visible, upload modal multi-page works, uploaded logo appears on all 3 public pages (/, /university-change, /germany-fair). Footer branches all 4 present with tel: links.

issues: Welcome toast that appears after login overlaps several tab buttons (Reviews/WhatsApp/Header Logo) for ~3s. Real users can wait but it briefly intercepts pointer events. Consider toast position bottom-right or shorter duration.

critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.jsx is now ~2686 lines and contains 5 modals + 4 managers; consider splitting (PartnerLogosManager / AddPartnerLogoModal could move to separate files) for maintainability.

Backend POST /api/dashboard/partner-logos accepts file size only after fully reading bytes into memory; for very large rejected uploads this still consumes memory. Consider using `file.spool_max_size` or streamed length check via Content-Length header for early rejection (minor).

Frontend AddReviewModal fires N parallel POSTs via Promise.all (one per page); if any single one fails, the others still succeed but the toast says 'Failed' and there is no rollback / partial success indicator. Optional: report 'Created X of Y'.
Both AddReviewModal & AddPartnerLogoModal duplicate page-options + checkbox UI; consider extracting a <PageMultiSelect> shared component (DRY).
seed_data_creation: Left in DB: 5 reviews (TEST Reviewer Main/UC/GF + TEST UI Reviewer x2 for main+germany_fair) and 3 partner logos (TEST Logo Main+GF, TEST Logo UC, TEST UI Logo). Per request, no teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All endpoints for reviews & partner-logos are working. Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_reviews_partner_logos.py uses BASE_URL=REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL and admin creds via query params. Public partner-logos endpoint correctly hides is_active=false logos. Footer branches use data-testid='footer-branch-{city_lower}'. Dashboard tab toggle behavior: clicking same tab again returns to leads view (intentional).
